name: github_update_self_hosted_runner_group_for_org
description: Update the name and visibility of a self-hosted runner group in an organization (PATCH /orgs/{org}/actions/runner-groups/{runner_group_id}). Provide name and optionally visibility (selected|all|private), allows_public_repositories, restricted_to_workflows, selected_workflows, network_configuration_id. Classic tokens need admin:org scope. HTTP 200 with the updated group. See GitHub REST self-hosted runner groups.
